title: Mayhem
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}

The '''''Mayhem''''' was an Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] serving as an escort to the [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']].

The ''Mayhem'' was the ship to receive a convoy consisting of 3 [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]]; ''[[Strider (freighter)|Strider]]'', ''[[Treader]]'' and [[Walker (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Walker'']] near [[Cificap VIII]]. One of the freighters, the ''Walker'', contained [[Habassa]] slaves, which was why Rebel operations rescued them before the ''Mayhem'' could arrive to convince the Habassa to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

Much later, the Habassa had joined the Alliance. In order to destroy the ''Relentless'', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and [[Habassa]] agreed to lure the frigate somewhere in order to capture her.

Having two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]], [[Filve (CR90 corvette)|''Filve'']] and [[Bilbringi (CR90 corvette)|''Bilbringi'']] meet somewhere for an officers' meeting, and letting the information 'leak' with a known Imperial spy, Mayhem came to disrupt the meeting.

However this was a trap. [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]], assisted by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] managed to disable and capture the frigate.

==Behind the scenes==
The fate of the ''Mayhem'' has not been canonically established. ''X-wing'' provides two alternative missions concerning the frigate, either capture her, or just her officers. The above article shows only one alternative.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
